description: Complete system overview documenting the AI dispute resolution architecture, core components, and their interactions
Detailed documentation of the court engine's decision-making algorithms, including SLA rules, format validation, confidence-based auto-ruling, and panel voting systems
Comprehensive documentation of the agent tier system, including session management, sponsorship mechanisms, device attestation, and stake requirements for different agent types
Complete documentation of data models and relationships between agents, cases, evidence, rulings, and constitutional rules, including schema definitions and relationships
Detailed documentation of the evidence management system, including cryptographic validation, model metadata tracking, and case linkage mechanisms
